rationale: No conflict. Fam. Code §101.0302 defines the State Disbursement Unit for child support payments. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: "State disbursement unit" means the unit established and operated by the Title IV-D agency under 42 U.S.C. Section 654b that has responsibility for receiving, distributing, maintaining, and furnishing child support payments and records on or after October 1, 1999.
_note: Rule text concerns child support disbursement; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
